nasb.text: You, therefore, hear the word of the Lord, all you exiles, whom I have sent away from Jerusalem to Babylon.

esv.text: Hear the word of the Lord, all you exiles whom I sent away from Jerusalem to Babylon:

cnv.text: “你們這所有被擄去的，就是我從耶路撒冷趕逐到巴比倫去的，要聽耶和華的話。

ccb.text: 因此，你们这些从耶路撒冷被掳到巴比伦的人啊！要听耶和华的话。
